_comment: Advisory only. day injects context; it never gates, denies, or rejects an agent action. No hook here may ever emit a blocking decision -- tests/plugin.rs enforces that, and docs/TELOS.md explains why (affordance, not enforcement: crosslink's blocking hooks are the friction this tool exists to avoid repeating).
_why_no_session_end: day hook session-end exists as a command but is deliberately NOT registered. Only UserPromptSubmit, UserPromptExpansion, and SessionStart add hook stdout to the model's context; every end-of-session event writes to the debug log, so a prompt registered there would silently reach nobody. The one mechanism that would deliver text at that moment is Stop's blocking decision, which affordance-not-enforcement forbids. The useful content moved into the SessionStart hook above.
